name: supernatural_belief_system
description: Measures the breadth and content of an individual's supernatural and metaphysical beliefs, capturing both orthodox religious doctrines (God, heaven, hell, soul) and folk or syncretic beliefs (witchcraft, karma, reincarnation, limpias), which together index the structure of a person's cosmological worldview.

name: religious_practice_and_devotion
description: Captures the intensity of personal religious practice and devotional behavior, including prayer frequency, seeking comfort in religion, use of religious values in family life, reliance on religious figures for guidance, and ritual observance for life events.

name: religious_socialization_and_identity
description: Measures the degree to which religious identity was transmitted through family and formal education and remains stable across generations, reflecting the strength of religious socialization as a mechanism of cultural reproduction.

name: church_state_separation_attitudes
description: Assesses citizens' normative views on the appropriate boundaries between religious institutions and the public sphere, including opinions on churches in politics, use of public resources for religious events, church taxation, media religious content, and clergy involvement in political discourse.

name: religious_tolerance_and_pluralism
description: Measures an individual's acceptance of religious diversity and willingness to coexist with people of different faiths, including perceptions of freedom of religion, tolerance within family and community, and attitudes toward exclusion or expulsion based on religious minority status.
